name: generate
summary: Converts the Zustand diagram snapshot into a prompt and sends it to /api/generate (app-service) to produce CLAUDE.md, README.md, OpenAPI YAML, Terraform, or Docker Compose output. Uses shiki for syntax highlighting in preview.
key_notes: generate() reads Zustand state imperatively at call time (useDiagram.getState()) — not subscribed.
Scope can be 'full' or 'selected' — selected filters nodes+connectors to selectedNodeIds.
The actual AI call goes to /api/generate (Vite-proxied to app-service), not directly to Anthropic from the browser.
